executives.name: Ajay Singh
executives.background: Ajay Singh has served as our Chief Product Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining Pure, Mr. Singh served as Senior Vice President and General Manager of the Cloud Management Business Unit at VMware, Inc. from 2014 to 2021. Prior to VMware, Mr. Singh held various leadership roles at Hewlett-Packard Company and was the CEO of several startups.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Manager, Cloud Management business unit

executives.name: Brett Shirk
executives.background: Brett Shirk has served as our Chief Revenue Officer since February 2020. Prior to joining Fastly, Mr. Shirk served as Executive Vice President and Chief Revenue Officer of Rubrik, Inc., a cloud data management company, from January 2019 to February 2020.

executives.name: Egon Durban
executives.background: Co-CEO of Silver Lake, a global technology investment firm.

executives.name: Karen Dykstra
executives.background: Karen Dykstra has served as a member of our board of directors since 2022. She previously served as CFO and CAO of AOL and CFO of Automatic Data Processing (ADP).

executives.name: Kevan Krysler
executives.background: Kevan Krysler has served as our Chief Financial Officer since December 2019. Prior to joining Pure, Mr. Krysler served as Senior Vice President, Corporate Controller at VMware, Inc. from 2013 to 2019. Prior to VMware, Mr. Krysler was a partner at KPMG LLP, where he served in the firm's Silicon Valley technology practice.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President of Finance and Chief Accounting Officer

executives.name: Marianne Brown
executives.background: Marianne C. Brown was Co-Chief Operating Officer, Global Financial Solutions, of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS).

executives.name: Michael Dell
executives.background: Michael S. Dell is the Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Dell Technologies. He has served as Chairman of the Board since Dell's inception in 1984 and as Chief Executive Officer since 2004. Mr. Dell also served as CEO from 1984 to 2004.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Patrick Gelsinger
executives.background: Patrick P. Gelsinger has been a director and Intel’s CEO since February 2021. He has over 40 years of technology and leadership experience, including 30 years at Intel in various engineering and leadership roles. Prior to returning to Intel, he served as CEO of VMware, Inc. from 2012 to 2021 and as President and COO of EMC Corp.’s Information Infrastructure Products business from 2009 to 2012.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Stephen Luczo
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Seagate Technology.
